reviews.title: Refused to work together towards a resolution
reviews.text: Tried to stay here as a surprise for my wife's birthday, my wife's time off was requested (yes for her actual birthday) I tried to request assistance in moving or canceling the booking to move it. Repeated attempts were rebuffed leading to them essentially taking my money for free. I refuse to stay at a Conrad brand after this utter disrespect and inability to be flexible is embarrassing in 2025
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: This review is for booking.com only.  I would NEVER book with them again.  Conrad was wonderful to deal with.

reviews.title: Terrible customer service
reviews.text: Rude and racist bellboys. Incompetent management. Absolutely disgraceful. Go elsewhere if you do not want your vacation ruined.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The hotel overcharged me by hundreds of dollars and will not return any of my phone calls or emails.

reviews.title: 5 star hotel with 2 star service
reviews.text: On the whole, the hotel is comfortable.  However, I was disappointed with the Front Desk as they do not seem to answer the  telephone.  Our lugguages were not delivered to our room till over half an hour later after a few phone calls to complain.
reviews.positives: Comfortable bed, quiet surrounding and close to some sights

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I tried to change the date of the reservation through Booking.com app and didn't work because it was bugged. I called Booking.com and was told to call the hotel. I called the hotel and they were rude and said that only Booking.com could do it. I called again Booking.com and was told that only the hotel could. I end up paying almost $1,000 penalty and couldn't change my reservation. Was a loyal user of Booking.com. Not using it anymore.

reviews.title: Travel
reviews.text: Not worth the price. Even basic Wi-Fi never worked, our room didn’t match what Agoda’s website mentioned, and the Assistant Director's cold and insincere handling of our concerns was disappointing. The service fell below luxury expectations. Agoda's follow-up service was also unsatisfactory.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Room
reviews.text: As above
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Nice hotel in financial district
reviews.text:
I stayed in this hotel from 30 December - 2 January, so basically, I was spending my new year in New York City.
I stayed here with my friend and we had a blast in New York City.

The hotel was not expensive given the time, the room is big and nice. The downside is that is not located in the heart of the city so it was far for us to reach downtown. However this was a small issue given the superb transportation service of New York city.

Overall the hotel is quite ok and I will recommend the hotel to my friends.
reviews.positives: Price and view

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text:
Location might not be ideal for inexperienced NY travellers; if taking the subway does not bother you, the hotel is easy to reach and get around; hence, location no reason to not book (two blocks to next subway station). 

Nice, still new and spacious rooms for NY standards. Appreciated the Nespresso machine in the room and the two TV's. Few rooms with actual river view. 

For a "luxury" hotel, however, the hotel lacks atmosphere or charm throughout; be it in the rooms, the (large) lobby or other public areas. 
While free internet access with printer is offered in the business center, it still borders at being inacceptable that they try to charge USD 15/day for in-room internet access. Management: Change this, even if this might be NY standard (in the rest of the world, it is not). 

On the whole: Good stay, good value for money for the rate paid.
reviews.positives: nice, spacious rooms

reviews.title: Nice hotel with big well equiped rooms
reviews.text: Nice helpfull service on the hotel. The bar was a bit boring and the location of the hotel where to fare away from where "things happen". But the rooms where very nice and spacy compared to other hotels on Manhattan.
reviews.positives: Big rooms

reviews.title: A good hotel but not 5 star
reviews.text: We booked a riverview room suite and had proof of that. When we arrived the concierge was snooty and when I asked if we had a riverview room, he sniffed at me and suggested I was trying to get an upgrade, which I wasn't. We went to the room and it was the wrong room, so after a good hour of haggling they gave me the room I paid for. Not a good start and it really dampened our spirits as this place looked so nice and I had booked this far in advance and we were looking forward to it. We then found out this hotel has no pool, no spa and no steam room, this I could not believe. Their gym was small and of little use. The room was nice and a nice bed, but the TV was poorly located in the sitting area and it looked cheap and was poorly done. The maids did a great job and the fellow who checked us out was excellent. So a good 4 star hotel in my view, not 5 star.
reviews.positives: Location, the lobby and the bed was nice

reviews.title: Excellent impression for first visit
reviews.text: This is the first time I stay in this hotel, very friendly staff and I have an upgrade on the room for using the Hilton card. The room is excellent and have great view.
reviews.positives: Location, comfort bed, very good and polite staff

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: It's a nice hotel but a bit older than before and more wear and tear...but staff still very friendly and facilities are clean...much more expensive than a few years ago ..
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Good condition and nice bedding
reviews.positives: noce place

reviews.title: Good hotel location near Wall street
reviews.text: Good hotel location near down town New York, comfortable room and friendly hotel staff
reviews.positives: Good hotel location near down town New York,comfortable room and friendly hotel staff

reviews.title: We have good time in NY. The weather was good
reviews.text: good to stay, many flower in Spring, easy to walk around
reviews.positives: clean, good location, nice staff

reviews.title: Wonderful!
reviews.text:
This is my third time staying at Conrad New York. Staffs are extremely friendly and helpful, particularly the Bellboy. They smiled and greeted all the guests who entered the hotel. I was there 6 months ago with my family and this time, I was there for business purpose. The Bellboy remembered me well and asked me how was my family doing. I was very impressed. 
The cleaning ladies and Front Desk are all very helpful and attentive, too. I went to the hotel the night before I checked in and requested for a twin room because a friend from Boston would come visit me with her baby. The lady at the Front Desk kindly sent the request for me. 
The next day when I checked in in the afternoon, another lady at the Front Desk said to me,’ I do not know how you get this room but we don't normally offer it to customer who did not book it in advance'. I was a bit shocked when I heard that as her manner was rather unfriendly. I explained to her if someone in needs has already booked the room in advance, they can have it. She shrugged. 
In general, I had a wonderful experience staying at Conrad New York. It is still my first choice of hotel in New York.
reviews.positives: Staff, Room, Staff!

reviews.title: nice sized room away from crowd
reviews.text: Overall positive but they can def improve their hospitality service. We had to pay extra for a fridge to store our food, no fridge was available for storage. No utensil in the room.
reviews.positives: spacious, quiet and new

reviews.title: The office business district is quiet in the evening.
reviews.text: You need to take the subway to Midtown, but you might find it enjoyable to ride the subway. In the evening, it's quiet and you can also see the office workers from the surrounding financial district. The rooms with views of the Hudson River offered by Conrad are special but somewhat small. If you want to experience a great view and prefer to sleep well in a quiet place, it's worth considering.
reviews.room_type: RIVER VIEW SUITE W ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Good Location
reviews.text: Great location right next to a mall and good view.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: nice view
reviews.text: The view was perfect in the room, and it was so nice, loved bathroom since it was large compared to other hotels in NYC.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Very good
reviews.positives: good location, very nice, very clean and good service
reviews.room_type: HUDSON RIVER VIEW SUITE WITH ONE KING BED

reviews.title: Nice Hotel
reviews.text: Stayed here for 2 days in mid July. The reception gave me early check in around 10am which is pretty amazing thing to do. Nice view of Hudson river. Plenty of restaurants and mall nearby. missing nyc already
reviews.positives: Luxury, Clean, Friendly staff

reviews.title: Very clean & new hotel. quite spacious modern look
reviews.text:
I like the comfortable bed best.
also it has 2 Big LCD TV,
but the location is a little to near to the quite north sides of New York, not for people who prefers crowds.

but, it has a few decent restaurants nearby. overall I find it pretty satisfy, 
if you want to feel the real New York, you may not like this sort of hotel. but if you prefer the quite side of New York.
it is very recommended.
reviews.positives: by the name "Conrad" you already know the class

reviews.title: great less noise hotel od New York
reviews.text:
this hotel is perfect for young adult.
the room layout is good.
the amenities is unique with aromatherapy theme.

the button of the switch is futuristic (glass panel button)

it seems that the room is futuristic brought to present day.
reviews.positives: nice interior & overall design of the hotel

reviews.title: Modern hotel in a great location
reviews.text: Overall very pleased with our stay. Modern hotel with great service. Will recommend to others.
reviews.positives: Location Location Location!

reviews.title: Great stay which exceeded my expectations
reviews.text: Huge suite in a very convenient location! It’s a very short walk to the World Trade Center which has multiple subway lines. Also very convenient to the west side highway for driving and a morning run. I loved it! My new go-to hotel in nyc.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Big room and very clean , comfortable bed.
reviews.text: Very high standard five stars hotel, good location to 9/11 memorial , all subways can be reached. Lots of cafe n restaurants nearby , up market area if you want to get away from congested mid town.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Better than expected!
reviews.positives: The price, the modern European standard, the large room

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Toilet was scratched up. Shower was small and leaked onto bathroom floor. Carpet was not cleaned one day. Final bill had 11 charges for "mini bar" that were not correct - mini bar was never used.

reviews.title: Super pampered
reviews.text: It was almost perfect. The lounge is really well designed, and the service staff was excellent. The rooms were big and comfortable, with really lush toilet and bath area. The bed was also really comfortable and we had a really great stay at Conrad. Room service was prompt and wifi was useful. Although the hotel is not right next to a Metro station, it is a nice walk from Conrad to Battery Park and Financial District to the Metro station. Path station is also close by, allowing quick access to Newark. Conrad doesn't disappoint!
reviews.positives: Full-suite, awesome service, comfortable beds

reviews.title: We enjoyed our stay but expected a more satisfactory stay for the amount of money we paid.
reviews.positives: The lobby is stunning and amenities were very nice.
reviews.negatives: There were many issues with our room including no wand on the blinds, so we were unable to open or close the blinds, the water filter would not produce water, and the body wash and shampoo were empty when we arrived.

reviews.title: luxurious hotel worth a shot
reviews.text:
24 hr fitness was one of my favorite
spacious sweet room and the location  was also great
reviews.room_type: DELUXE STE 2 DBLS MOB ACC RI SHWR W SOFA BED

reviews.title: It was one of the worst experiences in 5 star hotel
reviews.positives: The location , the overhead shower , the bed , the valley services people and their dealing with guests
reviews.negatives: False info about the room in booking when I booked , I asked for room with balcony and it turned out that the hotel has no balconies at all but it was clearly mentioned before booking , also bad reception when I arrived and the lifts are scary, they have huge sounds and shaking

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: great  place to stay, neat  and clean ,  with all the facilities
reviews.room_type: DELUXE STE 2 DBLS MOB ACC RI SHWR W SOFA BED

reviews.title: Had to check out same day. Bed was broken. Told front desk. They only apologized. I’ve stay here before, very disappoint
reviews.positives: Location. Front desk guy upon check in was very friendly
reviews.negatives: The couch had evident stains. The bed was sunken in at the head; broken bed.

reviews.title: My first time in New York!
reviews.text:
It's relatively inexpensive for a Conrad. It's within walking distance to the Brooklyn Bridge, and you can see the Statue of Liberty, albeit small. 

It's a bit of a distance to Times Square and Central Park, but the station and bus are close by.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite 2 Doubles With Sofabed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Rooms are spacious and good size. Cleanliness and good service done well by the housekeeping.
reviews.negatives: The room had a lot of maintenance issues. The A/c was not working, where I had to stay in the hot room the entire day. The hot water was not working… the front of the drawer fell out. Overall, the maintenance person had to keep entering the room again and again the entire stay. Not a very comfortable experience.

reviews.title: Great location - amazing value!
reviews.text: We stayed the previous night at a 5 star boutique hotel nearby and frankly, I regretted not having stayed in Conrad for 2 nights. The room is spacious for manhattan hotel, sofa bed & king bed combo was amazing. Great view into Hudson River and you can walk into WTC shopping mall without being caught in the rain. I’d stay here again!
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Awesome stay
reviews.text: We really enjoyed staying at the Conrad downtown. The room was spacious and impeccably clean. The attention to detail by the cleaner was amazing. Staff were very courteous and prompt. Concierge Michael helped get tickets for well placed seats at a Broadway show. Great service!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great location , close to subway , lovely rooms perfect if you just want somewhere to stay but you want something nice
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite 2 Doubles With Sofabed

reviews.title: Fancy hotel to stay
reviews.positives: Service, cleaniness, interior decoration

reviews.title: Top notch
reviews.text: One of the best Hilton hotel i have ever stay in around the world. Met my expectations, no complains. Location is more suited for business travelers and it is close to financial district and just 2 blocks away from ground zero.
reviews.positives: Services, stay, room

reviews.title: Modern and Classy
reviews.text: We had a great stay at the hotel. We like the modern design of the lobby which is fascinating. The staff are very pleasant and welcoming.The room was very spaciousand clean. The hotel is good place to stay for business people but not for the travellers seeking fun and leisure. Not much restaurants, bars or place to shop around.In short there is no nightlife nearby. You still have to take 15-20 minutes cab to reach the downtown. Though it is just few blocks away from the world trade center site.
reviews.positives: Good place to realx with a nice view of the river

reviews.title: Great Place!
reviews.text: It was a pleasure staying at the Conrad hotel downtown in NYC. It's very clean, quiet, and easy to access local transportation. Additionally, the staff at Conrad are very nice, kind, and smile all the time. I will stay here again when I visit NYC next time, and I strongly recommend the Conrad Hotel downtown NYC.
reviews.room_type: RIVER VIEW SUITE W ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Exceptional rooms in good location
reviews.text: We stayed here for 3 nights to visit friends and the city. The location is good, at walking distance to SoHo. The rooms were amazing and the staff, excellent! Highly recommend.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Spacious modern suite room
reviews.text: The room we stayed was a king suite and everything from amenities to furniture was met our satisfaction. The location is not necessarily convenient since we used subway but we enjoyed waterfront view and serenity. Highly recommend.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Best of best!!
reviews.text:
We highly recommend the Conrad!
Staff is generally kind and nice.
What makes this hotel special is room service and house keeping. They are so generous and sweet that definitely come back here. Thank you so much for making great holiday stay in NYC
reviews.room_type: HUDSON RIVER VIEW SUITE WITH ONE KING BED

reviews.title: Everything’s amazing except…
reviews.text: The “snack bar”. Would've been a straight 10 if it’s just a usable, regular fridge. I can’t find a place to store my food! Everything else has been awesome except just this. Might be a plus if there’s a bath tub.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Simply the best for staying downtown
reviews.text: Phenomenal staff,  spotlessly clean, great room size. Love this place.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Superlative
reviews.text: Every aspect of staying here was an absolute pleasure - fantastic room with great views, great location, most importantly brilliant staff who really couldn't do enough for you. I would definitely stay here again.
reviews.room_type: HUDSON RIVER VIEW SUITE WITH ONE KING BED

reviews.title: Excellent stay in Downtown - don't book anywhere else!
reviews.text:
I had booked 4 hotels during my 2-week trip to New York and Conrad Downtown was by far the best. It very clearly outshone The Peninsula, where I'd spent a lot more money to be greeted by rude staff. 

If you're looking for somewhere to stay downtown, I don't think you can do any better than this hotel. Everyone was friendly and greeted me, even housekeeping so it makes you feel truly welcome.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Perfect accomodation in Downtown
reviews.text: The location is great, if you plan to stay in downtown. The rooms are huge for NYC, extremely clean  and nice amenities. The hotel is new and has a fancy design. Definetely recommend it.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: An amazing hotel at an amazing location
reviews.text: We stayed for a couple of days at the Conrad as a staycation for our wedding anniversary. The first thing that strikes me is how beautiful the lobby is. It is located at a perfect location and we absolutely loved our stay there. The rooms are clean and unlike any Ive seen, there is a water purifier in built within every room, which was amazing. We had breakfast at the Atrio on both of the days which was pretty good. Overall we had an amazing time and would consider Conrad whenever we are in the city again
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Super good room amenities
reviews.text: Feel like  staying at home.  Good coffee n clean filter water.  Room smells pleasant and clean without strong fragrance.
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: I was expecting more from this hotel chain.
reviews.positives: The property was beautiful and the rooms were decent size for NYC
reviews.negatives: They lost our luggage twice ! Once when we checked in and again at checkout. My luggage had medical supplies for my son so it was stressful till they found it. No apology either

reviews.title: Now it feels like the United States.
reviews.text: I'm at Times Square, and being here really feels like America. It's great for a walk, and the environment is very nice.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.positives: I love staying at the Conrad downtown but my last visit was disappointing
reviews.negatives: I booked months in advance 2 doubles for a girls bday weekend with my sister and when I checked in the put us in a king handicap room. I showed my reservation confirmation and was told that they would change back to doubles. I received no phone call and when we got back to the room we were in an accessible room again. I booked 6 months in advance!  we had to set up towel barriers because the water from the shower was all over the bathroom. not the birthday weekend I had planned.

reviews.title: great stay at Conrad
reviews.text:
Ideal location
Friendly staff
Very nice hotel
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with Two Double Beds

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Good location and facilities
reviews.negatives: The blinds weren’t working since we checked in, raised issue 3 times and no-one came to fix and inspect it, resulted in the room being dark for the full stay. Room lacks natural light regardless if blinds work, the lighting in the room is weak in all areas. Slight issue in cleanliness.

reviews.title: Spacious, Private, and Perfect for a Family Stay in NYC
reviews.text:
We recently booked our first stay through Agoda at Conrad New York Downtown, and everything exceeded our expectations—from the seamless check-in to the beautiful accommodations! We were celebrating our son’s 19th birthday and needed a room that offered both space and privacy for the three of us. The King Suite was exactly what we were looking for. It featured two sliding doors that created completely separate rooms, with a sleeper sofa in one area—perfect for added privacy.

The suite was even more spacious than we imagined based on the online descriptions. The hotel itself is in a fantastic location, with a lovely view of the river and easy access to everything we needed. We absolutely plan to stay here again on future trips to New York and will be using Agoda for our travel bookings going forward!
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Great location, some disappointments
reviews.positives: Location was great. Housekeeping did clean well. Mexican and bagel Shop were great, movie theater was awesome
reviews.negatives: I found a tick in my room on the first night. charged for bottles of water that were left out and appeared complimentary. The check in staff were not friendly

reviews.title: Top accommodation
reviews.text: From the moment I arrived until the time I left, everything was so comfortable and the staff was very kind. I felt like I was at the best hotel for 7 nights and 8 days. Thank you. I also really appreciate the cleaning every time I returned after going out~~
reviews.room_type: DELUXE SUITE WITH ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Loved everything
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with Two Double Beds

reviews.title: Perfect stay in NYC
reviews.text: I went with my two kids. Kids love the room. Clean. The water power is also strong enough to release the stress from travel. The most convenient thing is having a water purifier in the room, which makes us drink a lot of water without any concern.
reviews.room_type: RIVER VIEW SUITE W ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: You can't miss living this experience Conrad!
reviews.text: Everything in this hotel is wonderful. The places to stay... the deluxe suite rooms are highly recommended to go with children. The place is spacious, everything is perfect if you want to have a good time... you can't stop booking now! The employees always helped us with a smile given the work of Maggie Melendez, she gave us fabulous recommendations! Everyone should live an experience to start the new year with all the positive energy that having been there gives you. Super recommended. We will return!
reviews.room_type: DELUXE STE 2 DBLS MOB ACC RI SHWR W SOFA BED

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Would highly recommend. Great area with loads of food options. Hotel was nice and clean and the staff were very friendly.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite 2 Doubles With Sofabed

reviews.title: Child and downtown
reviews.text: After being in Manhattan and coming to the downtown hotel, I was even more satisfied. It's nice to walk with my child as it is close to the 9/11 Memorial and the Trade Center.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Amazing!
reviews.text: Overall experience is absolutely amazing! The rooms are all suites so it’s large and comfortable to live in. I love the interior design of the room as well. The location is fantastic, right beside the Hudson River and Goldman headquarter, it’s safe and you can always easily enjoy the beautiful view of the Hudson River. And most amazingly, the hotel incorporates sustainability practices really well, I’m impressed and touched by the use of water filter inside the room to reduce the usage of plastic bottles. And the complimentary little gift - 2 reusable water bottles, further encourages ppl to be more sustainable in their daily lives.  Sustainable business should always be valued and supported. It feels really good to see that leaders in the hospitality industry are already driving changes. It’s just amazing :))
reviews.room_type: RIVER VIEW SUITE W ONE KING BED AND SOFA BED

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Staying at Conrad New York was great with kind staffs and would like to recommend this hotel for NewYork.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with Two Double Beds

reviews.title: Friendliest Staff
reviews.text: From the time I arrived I was treated special. Like I was the only person that mattered. From the valet, to the door man ( Who walked us to the elevator and pressed the button for us) to the front desk staff( Who gave exceptional service). It was an amazing experience I will use Conrad every month I return to New York. I would give more Stars if it was possible!!!!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Affordable Luxury
reviews.text: The location of this hotel is wonderful, and the hotel is even better.  The lobby is well-maintained and has a great, clean scent.  The rooms are very large for a metropolitan hotel, and the staff is attentive to every need.  Breakfast was also very good, and had several options for those with allergies/dietary needs.  I will definitely be staying here again when I come back to NYC!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with One King Bed

reviews.title: Classy and convienent
reviews.text: Loved the hi-end look and cleanliness of the rooms. We didn't stay in the hotel much but the beds were comfortable and had a great sleep and stay.
reviews.positives: hi-end, convienent and clean

reviews.title: perfect business hotel
reviews.text: The stay was perfect. Had meetings in long island the first day and NJ the 2nd day - Very easy access to the bridge / Tunnel and could be in minutes in NJ / Long Island. Though, a lot of my clients did not know about this hotel, which was surprising - The hotel was really the best choice for me.
reviews.positives: great location / great value for money / easy to access

reviews.title: amazing hotel spacious rooms
reviews.text: Moved here from an absolutely shocking hotel near times square. This was ten times better highly recommend. Got an upgrade for our honeymoon.
reviews.positives: fantastic

reviews.title: Cher pour la prestation
reviews.text: Je suis souvent venue dans cet hôtel à l époque du Embassy suites. C est un bel hôtel, mais internet a 14,95 la connectio internet pour 24 heures est un peu chère  et le petit déjeuner n est pas compris. Je ne peux pas le recommander, je suis très déçue .
reviews.positives: Confortable  accueillant belle deco

reviews.title: Hôtel charmant
reviews.text:
L'hôtel est superbe, les chambres sont spacieuses et à un prix abordable. 

L'accueil est fantastique, le personnel est à votre disposition pour vos demandes. 

Le lit est d'un comfort exceptionnel. 

Poitn négatif: Pas de parking. Sachant qu'à New York le parking est ultra cher.
reviews.positives: Excellent room service, excellent accueil

reviews.title: Magnifique décor du hall impressionnant
reviews.text:
Hotel situé au cœur de Manhattan. Tout était parfait! Sauf les accès aux parking pour la voiture qui était très cher!
Faut compter 50 dollars par nuit pour mettre votre voiture dans le parking, qui n'est meme pas celui de l'hotel. Le voiturier prend trop de temps pour ramener la voiture.
reviews.positives: location confort calm

reviews.title: Schönes Hotel, ruhig und grosse ZImmer
reviews.text: Alles o.k., es gab  keine Probleme , schönes Hotel
reviews.positives: Schönes Hotel, ruhig und grosse ZImmer

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Sehr schönes Design. Ausgesprochen freundliches und zuvorkommendes Personal.
Top Lage und Aussicht auf den Hudson und die Freiheitsstatue (Eckzimmer)
Ungewöhnlich große, sehr saubere und ruhige Zimmer. 
Bereits der zweite Aufenthalt, unser NYFavorit
reviews.room_type: HUDSON RIVER VIEW SUITE WITH ONE KING BED

reviews.title: バランスのとれたホテル
reviews.text: 今回、２回目だったが、申し分なし。ゆっくり落ち着いて過ごせました。あえて言うならバスタブが付いていれば、完璧。
reviews.positives: 清潔感、静か、広い

reviews.title: 清潔で機能的な部屋、かなり快適です。
reviews.text:
年末年始に宿泊しましたが、他の高級ホテルと比べるとリーズナブルでしたので選びました。
スイートタイプのお部屋で、2ヶ所ある仕切りドアでそれぞれ区切る事ができ、とても良かったです。
ホテルは新しく清潔で、とても快適に過ごせました。
駅へも歩けます。
reviews.positives: 部屋の作り、新しい、機能性

reviews.title: 豪華で雰囲気が良い
reviews.text:
ロケーションも良く
ホテルは快適で良い
ホテルのスタッフは気さくで気軽にしゃべりかけてくれる。
アメニティも揃い過ごしやすい。
reviews.positives: ホテルのサービス　部屋の快適さ　ラグジュアリー感

reviews.title: とってもいいホテルでしたが・・・
reviews.text: 新しいこともあって、とても清潔でアメニティーも素晴らしかったです。ただ、朝食は選べるものが少なくスープなども元々メニューにありませんでした。またバスタブ付きの部屋とありましたが、実際はシャワーのみで眺めなどいいだけにがっかりでした。当日は変更できる部屋もなく・・・。またコンラッドで楽しみにしているマスコットも部屋にはなく、尋ねてみると今品切れにしているとのこと。「次回来る時に渡します」と言われたが、観光で日本から来ていておりそんなに頻繁にはこれないと伝えると、「では日本に送ります」との対応でした。ロケーションもよく、朝のジョギングなどには最高です。部屋にはネスプレッソなどの珈琲マシーンもあり、満足です。来年にはトップオブルーフで朝食もとれるようになるとか・・・期待しています。
reviews.positives: 安心できる設備です

reviews.title: 快適なホテル
reviews.text:
NY年末に過ごすため6日間滞在しました。部屋も広く、清潔快適でした。
地下鉄も苦にならないほどの距離で、移動もしやすかったです。NYでホテルはゆっくりと過ごしたいと思う方にはぴったりのホテルだと思います。
リバービューの部屋を取りましたが、少し見える程度で全面で楽しむものではありませんでした。しかし、ハドソン川は目の前なので朝の散歩はとても気持ちのいいものでした。
reviews.positives: 綺麗、広い、リラックスできる

reviews.title: きれい
reviews.text: ホテル内もお部屋もきれいで広くて、アクセスもよかったです！素敵な年越しができそうで嬉しいです☺️

객실도 넓어서 이용하기 좋고, 입구에있는 직원분이 친절하게 대해주셔서
캐리어도 쉽게 옮기고 주변 관광도 문의할수 있어서 좋았습니다.

reviews.title: Room and view is lovely . Not much to do at the hotel itself . Location is excellent .
reviews.positives: Great location . Convenient . Large room . View is great .
reviews.negatives: Bar closes too early at 11pm. Staff doesn’t want to serve you after 10:30pm. The lobby doesn’t have coffee shop open in the afternoon or evening. Room service closes early .

reviews.title: extra charge
reviews.text: 酒店房间很小，相对于豪气的大堂对比明显。一天停车65美金，超过一个多小时取车多收了我65。没有提前告知，服务非常不好
reviews.positives: 大堂 卫生 位置

reviews.title: Nice but out of the way
reviews.positives: The room was comfortable and it was nice to have a little sitting area. Loved the water filter in the room.
reviews.negatives: The location was not ideal if you wanted to go back and forth from day or night activities to the room. Not much in the area. We didn;t have much of a view but it is NYC

reviews.title: Very clean but not convenient  for visiting
reviews.text: The hotel room is spacious and very clean. However, we don’t find a very hospitality service. The stuffs aren’t helpful to solve the problems. We need to take subway for visiting the upper town and middle town, otherwise it will be a long walk. Better to stay 1-2nights to visit Brooklyn and statue de liberty, then change to other locations.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with Two Double Beds

reviews.title: Generally good, expect to be fleeced for restaurant/ room service.
reviews.positives: The hotel was clean and seemed well managed. Staff were nice and accommodating.
reviews.negatives: The hotel restaurant / room service prices were outrageous. $40+ for a pit of coffee? There was no available refrigerator space just super expensive minibar.

reviews.title: 位置很好
reviews.text:
套房空间很大，而且客厅沙发是气垫床可以睡一个。选的河景房，但给的低层，正好能看到对岸夜景。离世贸中心只有几分钟路程，位置很好，离地铁站也近，大概十分钟不到。

比较不爽的是，晚上十点多多次被电话，问两个行李是不是我们的，估计是搞错了。
reviews.room_type: HUDSON RIVER VIEW STE 1 KG HEARING ACCESSIBLE

reviews.title: Overall, service without a smile

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very nice, clean and upscale
reviews.negatives:
Rip you off for parking. Self
Parking option and valet doesn’t let you take your car back out without paying another exorbitant amount. I pay 60 dollar per day which is fine burg then when I went to take my car out for dinner they told me I would pay another 60 dollar when I get back. I said to the hotel why are you letting this happen that said it’s on your ticket. I looked and it’s not. What a racket and rip off

reviews.positives: Size of the room and the water filter.
reviews.negatives: Better customer service, friendlier staff, no refrigerator for personal items, no microwave.  A dirty cup in front of door on first day.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text:
We had a nice time in a hotel , but couple of thinks I wish to mention . 
1. The beds are small and it’s not a kings bed size , what is in my understanding.
2. The hotel is good 4 star, but not a 5. Think so. Interior is quite old generation and for such price can find more modern hotel .
3. Breakfast is not buffet and it’s quite poor and expensive.

Generally happy to stay in a hotel and personnel is welcome workers .
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with Two Double Beds

reviews.negatives: Minor details to be fixed in the room

reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with Two Double Beds

reviews.title: Great Location, Facilities needs to add / improve.
reviews.positives: Hotel with lots of modern tech and gadgets. Automatic water filter station and the complimentary water bottles provided was great initiative. Great location with lots of restaurants around.  The Gentleman at the front desk who assisted us on Sunday 15th October was amazing.
reviews.negatives: We stayed at one of the Hudson river view room. There is clear gap between both bathroom doors. Outsiders can clearly see activities inside. It is really uncomfortable when staying with kids. I do not recommend this type of room for families with childrens. Also our room was not equipped with the facilities as listed under the selected room category in booking.com. There was No microwave, no refrigerator, No kitchenette. Although microwave was provided after inquire about it. This is kind of misleading. I would expect Booking.com and Hotel to correct these errors.

reviews.title: Wonderful week in NYC
reviews.text: We had a wonderful time in NYC. The rooms were quite spacious for New York City. We travel with her two children. It was conveniently located next to Brookfield Place with excellent shopping. In addition, there was access to the path which was direct access to the subway without having to walk outside. Location was right by the battery Park ferry station, which was also a convenience. Located near the waterfront, it is a great place to allow you to take a morning or evening stroll. The area felt very safe. Service was attentive.  We were impressed with how the rooms were immaculate. Will definitely be back. We come to New York City at least 2 to 3 times per year and believe that we may have found our favorite place to stay.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Suite with Two Double Beds

reviews.title: Great location in the city and beautiful hotel. Loved the views and the river walk location,
reviews.positives: Great location. Clean spacious rooms, helpful staff.

reviews.title: Above expectations.
reviews.positives: Beautiful large rooms, guest gifts, comfortable bed but what I am going to miss more will be the shower. Huge shower and top bathing products.

reviews.positives: Clean and comfortable

reviews.title: Lovely relaxing environment and pleasant staff; make sure to ask for your car an hour ahead!
reviews.positives: The staff upon arrival and for turn down service was wonderful. The room is always so well thought out.  I really like having slippers and a robe,  although there was only one robe for some reason.  The shower is great and everything is very comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
The car service was way too delayed upon leaving.  I waited 45 minutes for my car and was late to my destination because I didn’t anticipate more than a 20 minute wait.  
I would have appreciated the option to not have a mini bar fridge,  just have it empty for some take out.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We came to visit NYC on vacation. The hotel is beautiful and in a very nice/safe part of the city. We stayed in a king suite. It was very clean, comfortable, and had any amenity you could possibly think of needing. The shower was amazing and the room was very nicely decorated. The staff was very helpful and kind. The hotel is a short walk from the Twin Tower Memorial and Pools, Statue of Liberty Ferry dock, and other tourist attractions.  I would definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: It was excellent!
reviews.positives:
The overall cleanliness, the smell of the place! I felt safe and so comfortable! 
Amazing bedding, the blackout curtains, i could list a number of things really.
reviews.negatives:
Not so much about the property more so i was disappointed to not find toothpaste in the bathroom. 
On the bright side, as soon as i called the concierge they sent me a kit!

reviews.title: Relaxing fun family time!
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.negatives: Suite accommodations were excellent! But when I checked in I wasnt informed about the facilities like the movie theater and when I arrived with family no bell hop helped us unload luggage. There was only 1 service person while multiple patrons were waiting for service.

reviews.title: Nice experience for NYC on Christmas
reviews.positives: The location and amenities were pretty good! 📍✨ They prepared a nice birthday gift for us, and the staff were very attentive! 🎁
reviews.negatives: The room was quite cold and the comfy was cold as well. 🥶 The doors are always open, so privacy doesn't feel so good. 😬 Kids running late might wake you up if you are sleeping on the couch. 😴

reviews.title: Amazing location and fabulous service
reviews.positives: The hotel is very well located on the west side of Manhattan. Right on the main running and recreational area where the Big Apple has re-developed the old piers into amazing recreational and sports spaces for families and young people.
reviews.negatives: The only negative was that the parking was very expensive and didn’t offer ‘in and out’ services. Once you handed it in, you would be charged another day parking each time you took it out.

It’s a fantastic choice for families with kids, offering plenty of space to relax. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable experience.

reviews.negatives: Seems petty, but for the price they should provide better quality TP and Kleenex. I know it’s a little thing…

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: WiDi at its best
reviews.positives: Like everything about the Conrad Downtown. My wife and I think to try something new and "special," but we are always drawn to the hotel. Five visits in five years. The hotel is walkable to so much. The Oculus is a block away. Ferry dock across the street. The on-site restaurant is extraordinary. There are many handfuls of restaurants within four blocks of the hotel. If you are interested in shopping, there are few better places in Manhattan than Brookfield Place mall. The FiDi area around the hotel is clean, well-lighted, and safe. The entire hotel is maintained beautifully. Nothing out of place; all fabrics looked as new as they did when we first stayed at the Conrad five years ago.

reviews.title: The best stay so far in NYC.
reviews.positives: Everything was perfect. The room, the food, the staff. They really go far and beyond your expectations.
reviews.negatives: Everything was amazing

reviews.title: Very comfortable, well designed and spacious rooms.
reviews.positives: I was in for TD 5 Boro Bike ride.  The staff was helpful in helping us unload our stuff and watching the car while we got checked in with our bikes.  Very helpful.
reviews.negatives: We were really looking forward to Loopy Doopy, but were so disappointed that it was closed for the season (it WAS ope this same time last year).  Also, there were very few other food options nearby open on the weekends - other than super fancy/expensive food.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The location was good.

reviews.title: Overall good.
reviews.positives: The location was nice. Room was OK. Reception was friendly.
reviews.negatives: The bellboys weren't polite / friendly (despite a really nice tip) and they weren't very gentle with the loggage. Except for the long tall guy at the street entrance - he was LOVELY! I would hire him if I could.

reviews.title: Great for semi-luxury experience in NYC
reviews.positives: Room and breakfast
reviews.negatives: Wifi wasn't working with room number but was fixed calling front desk

reviews.title: The stay was exceptional definitely will stay again
reviews.positives: Cleanliness of property and the location was great
reviews.negatives: Parking

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I loved how clean and accommodating this location was. Staff is friendly and helpful with any questions we had. We requested a microwave in our room for our leftovers and they brought one right up! The location was ideal for us and the shopping in the area was excellent. Lastly, the restaurant they have in the hotel was delicious, although a little overpriced (but that could be bc I’m used to TX prices lol)
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like that the “city view” was underwhelming although they feature it as an amenity.

reviews.title: Overall - this is an OUTSTANDING hotel and we will definitely be visiting again!!!
reviews.positives: This hotel was a complete surprise! We did not expect it to be so wonderful! The rooms are so modern and well equipped! We simply loved that everything is touch screen. Loved the Nespresso coffee machine and the Water filter machine. We are so glad that we decided to book a rate that included breakfast! Breakfast was delicious! The staff were all excellent.
reviews.negatives:
I would like to suggest that when clients have to check out long before breakfast time, that a contingency plan with proper food is available. 

We paid for breakfast for 3 mornings and only able to enjoy 2 because on the last day, we had to check out early because our flight was early. 

We were able to get some pastries and coffee and two bananas from the Barista station but that is not a proper, healthy breakfast - specially not for children. We did not consume the pastries until we had a proper breakfast at the airport which was a duplicate cost. 

Perhaps, for clients who have to miss breakfast, room service can put together some sandwiches, juice, yoghurt and fruit which can then be packed into a brown paper bag or box for easy transportation?

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The check-in was easy and quick. The staff was extremely accommodating. Also, the room service was very good. We are pleased with our stay/

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff was great and hotel room was large and very clean.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff were wonderful. There was a room available earlier than originally planned which was fabulous.
reviews.negatives: I just wish there was a pool.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: The master room could have been a bit bigger.

reviews.negatives: The mattress was too flat for my illness.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Clean, modern, spacious, great location
reviews.negatives: Huge crack in the bathroom sink, other some significant cracks in bedroom decor/accents

reviews.title: Would definitely stay again.
reviews.positives: Great space, location, ease of check in, friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: My drink at the bar could have been better for the price.

reviews.title: Absolutely GORGEOUS hotel with a spectacular staff.
reviews.positives: We were so pleasantly surprised by this location.  We will certainly be back.  It is a gorgeous property and quite comfortable.  We want to buy the bed!
reviews.negatives: It was a bit hard to figure out subways the first day.

reviews.title: Great location and very cozy
reviews.positives: Property is gorgeous. Nice views and very comfortable. Pricey but convenient.
reviews.negatives: I guess I wasn’t the hugest fan of the bar but considering it was new years it makes sense it would be packed. This isn’t something that would stop me from staying again.

reviews.title: We will definitely be back.
reviews.positives: Location is amazing, staff was very friendly and helpful. Very clean and beautiful.
reviews.negatives: There isn’t anything we didn’t like.

reviews.title: Would stay again.
reviews.positives: Food was good, pull out sofa was very comfortable! Service was friendly and top notch. Hotel decorated beautifully for Christmas, and provided pictures with Santa. Location was great to attractions. (Walkable) Parking was ok. All toiletries were top tier. Across from shopping mall. Movie theater on site.
reviews.negatives: Food at restaurant was pricey for the amount received. I did not realize the only refrigerator offering in the room, would be solely for the mini bar. Could not even keep bottles of water cold. No microwave for leftover foods ate while out, beds in suite too small for husband. Parking was very expensive! Not easily accessible if items were needed.

reviews.title: An elegant experience for families
reviews.positives: Clean, accessible and tasty. It was easy to get around. The facilities were clean which is hard to come by with many hotels these days. The breakfast was very tasteful. There was something for everyone from my 4 year old son to my 73 year old mother
reviews.negatives: Check in was a bit slow so were the elevators atimes. Other than that we liked the hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean, and spacious.

reviews.title: The location was great Staff is soo wonderful & accomadating.
reviews.positives: Walking the front door we got a wow warm feeling.  The foyer/lobby area was decorated for the holidays which made the ambiance even more special.  The Atrium is breathtaking & makes everything seem so airy & grand.  We had a water view suite and the view was amazing.  We were even able to see Lady Liberty from our window which was so unexpected and exciting.
reviews.negatives: There is no onsite parking.  However there are 2 parking garages within a very short walking distance.  The one we chose was literally around the corner.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: the fitness center has too little equipments and the equipment are a bit old

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.positives: Breakfast was excellent. Room was spotless- one of the cleanest hotels I've ever stayed in!

reviews.negatives: There was not one thing we didn't like and I am a hotel snob.

reviews.title: would stay there again
reviews.positives: new modern design, excellent room planning, cleanliness

reviews.title: One of the nicest boutique Hotels to stay in The World…….
reviews.positives: From the moment we arrived at the curb, the staff were friendly and very attentive.  The Hotel lobby is modern and beautiful.  The front desk clerk was so friendly and a pleasure to talk to.  We got on the elevator and there were two members of management and they were so welcoming and said welcome to our home.  We got to our room and were blown away by the room; spacious, warm and inviting.  The food at the restaurant was very tasty and the staff once again was so pleasant.  The clerk at the front desk from the Dominican Republic, all the housekeeping staff, Food and beverage Manager and the server at the restaurant from Poland  and the young lady at concierge service are gems.

reviews.title: really good stay, high recommended
reviews.positives: the location was great. room was clean and spotless. breakfast had lots of choices (buffet or menu).
